user_message: Help me prep the whitespace analysis for Adatum Corporation.

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF24-A trap (No freshness label); produces complete Contract summary with freshness labels, subscription type, renewal date, MACC state if applicable, b
